  5. Signature Processor

Signature Processor

Upload a photo of your signature, and we'll clean it up — remove the background, convert to black and white, and resize it for forms.

Choose a file or drag and drop

Accepted formats: IMAGE/JPEG,IMAGE/PNG,IMAGE/WEBP

Your files stay on your device

All conversion happens locally in your browser. Your images are never uploaded.

Tips for best results

Sign on a plain white piece of paper for the cleanest result. Avoid lined or colored paper.

Sign on a plain white piece of paper for the cleanest result. Avoid lined or colored paper.

Good lighting reduces shadows. Natural daylight works best.

Good lighting reduces shadows. Natural daylight works best.

Signatures are always exported as PNG files to preserve transparency.

Signatures are always exported as PNG files to preserve transparency. Image Compressor.

Privacy Policy

This site is not affiliated with any government agency. Tools process files locally in your browser.

Cookie Consent

We use cookies for essential site functionality and anonymous analytics to improve our service. We do not track you across other websites.
